title: stelis caldaria
intro: Stelis caldaria, also known as the 'Golden Orchid', is a species of orchid native to tropical regions. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to lower fever, reduce inflammation, and act as an expectorant. The health benefits of Stelis caldaria include its potential to aid in respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its possible use in treating skin conditions like eczema. Herbal preparations of Stelis caldaria often involve drying the plant's flowers and leaves, which are then made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
